title: GG&T Fakemon Fossils
description: This mod adds fossils for the GG&T Fakemon Pack!
body:
# **GG&T Fakemon Fossils**
This mod adds the _Lobe Fossil_ and the _Frill Fossil_ to Minecraft. These items exist for use with [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) and our [custom Fakemon pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ggt-pack).

The following fossil sites are modified to add this pack's fossils into the loot table:
- Dripstone Oasis
- Eroded Pillar
- Hydrothermal Vents
- Lush Den
- Mud Pit
- Sandy Den
- Submerged Impact
- Submerged Spike
- Sunscorched Den
- Sunscorched Remains
- Underwater Fissure
- Vibrant Hydrothermal Vents
